title: Displaying a trailer with bounding marks
abstract: Safety in the operation of a vehicle (1) with a trailer (2) is to be improved by simple means. For this purpose, there is provided a method for displaying at least part of the trailer (2) behind the vehicle (1) towing the trailer by capturing a rear of the trailer (2) by means of a camera of the vehicle and displaying an image of the captured rear of the trailer on a display in the vehicle (1). In particular, a mark (1) is displayed together with the image on the display, which indicates a rearward end of the trailer (2) in a transverse direction to the driving direction beyond the extension of the trailer.
claims:
Claims Patent Claims 1 . Method for displaying at least part of a trailer (2) behind a vehicle (1 ) towing the trailer (2) by - capturing a rear of the trailer (2) by means of a camera of the vehicle (1 ) and - displaying an image of the captured rear of the trailer (2) on a display in the vehicle (1 ), characterized by - displaying a first mark (M1 ) together with the image on the display, which indicates a rearward end of the trailer (2) in a transverse direction to the driving direction beyond the extension of the trailer (2) wherein likewise the rear of the vehicle (1 ) is represented in the image and a second mark (M2) in the image indicates a rearward end of the vehicle (1 ) in the transverse direction to the driving direction beyond the extension of the vehicle. 2. Method according to claim 1 , characterized in that a third mark (M3) is represented in the image, which indicates a predefined distance from the trailer (2) in the reverse driving direction. 3. Method according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that the capturing of the rear of the trailer (2) is performed from a left and a right side in relation to the direction of driving, the two corresponding views (MR, ML) are merged in the image and all marks (M1 , M2, M3) in a left half of the image are analogously also represented in a right half of the image. 4. Method according to claim 3, characterized in that captures of the rear of the trailer (2) are performed, on the one hand, by a camera on a left exterior mirror of the vehicle (1 ) and, on the other hand, by a camera on a right exterior mirror. 5. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that 

 in the image the mark or marks (M1 , M2, M3) extends/extend into one or more sections of a lane, shown in the image, which is adjacent to the lane (L2) in which the vehicle (1 ) is travelling. 6. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that each mark (M1 , M2, M3) is a line or bar shown in the image. 7. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the mark or marks (M1 , M2, M3) are automatically displayed only if the trailer (2) is attached to the vehicle (1 ). 8. Method according to any one of claims 1 to 6, characterized in that the mark or marks (M1 , M2, M3) are displayed only upon specific request. 9. Method according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized in that a position of at least one of the marks (M1 , M2, M3) is automatically determined by image processing of the captured rear of the trailer (2) and/or of the vehicle (1 ). 10. Method according to any one of claims 1 to 8, characterized in that a position of at least one of the marks (M1 , M2, M3) is automatically determined in dependence on a signal from the trailer (2). 1 1 . Display device for displaying at least part of a trailer (2) behind a vehicle (1 ) towing the trailer (2), having - a camera for capturing a rear of the trailer (2) of the vehicle (1 ) and - a display for displaying an image of the captured rear of the trailer (2), characterized by - a control device configured for controlling the display to display a first mark (M1 ) together with the image on the display, wherein - the first mark (M1 ) indicates a rearward end of the trailer (2) in a transverse direction to the driving direction beyond the extension of the trailer (2) wherein likewise the rear of the vehicle (1 ) is represented in the image and a 

 second mark (M2) in the image indicates a rearward end of the vehicle (1 ) in the transverse direction to the driving direction beyond the extension of the vehicle. 12. Vehicle with a display device according to claim 1 1 .
